scripts.dev: concurrently --names "API,UI" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.clean: rimraf node_modules frontend/node_modules backend/node_modules frontend/dist frontend/.vite backend/uploads && find . -type d -name __pycache__ -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null; find . -type d -name .ipynb_checkpoints -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null; find . -name '*.pyc' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -delete 2>/dev/null; echo 'Clean done.'
